queries.question: Which locations are the same for all the war correspondents?
queries.sql: SELECT Locations.locationName  from War_Correspondents_Locations join Locations on War_Correspondents_Locations.locationId = Locations.id join War_Correspondents on War_Correspondents_Locations.warCorrespondentId = War_Correspondents.id   GROUP BY War_Correspondents_Locations.locationId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT War_Correspondents_Locations.warCorrespondentId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  War_Correspondents)

queries.question: For every war correspondent, show the locations that they report from.
queries.sql: select war_correspondents.name , locations.locationname from War_Correspondents_Locations join Locations on War_Correspondents_Locations.locationId = Locations.id join War_Correspondents on War_Correspondents_Locations.warCorrespondentId = War_Correspondents.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?locationname WHERE {
  ?war_correspondents_locations a :War_Correspondents_Locations .
  ?locations a :Locations .
  ?war_correspondents_locations p:hasLocations ?locations .
  ?war_correspondents a :War_Correspondents .
  ?war_correspondents_locations p:hasWar_Correspondents ?war_correspondents .
  ?war_correspondents p:name ?name .
  ?locations p:locationName ?locationname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the locations that each war correspondent reports from.
